about.title: LinkedIn Text Formatter - Bold & Italic Generator | Boldify
about.description: Professional LinkedIn text formatter. Generate bold, italic, and styled text for your LinkedIn posts. Free online tool with instant preview.
about.keywords: linkedin formatter, linkedin text generator, linkedin bold text, linkedin italic, social media formatter, linkedin post tool
about.hero_description: Transform your plain text into professionally formatted LinkedIn posts with bold, italic, and styled text that stands out in your professional network.
about.bold_generator_desc: Create bold text that captures attention and emphasizes key points in your LinkedIn posts.
about.italic_formatting_desc: Add elegant italic styling to highlight quotes, thoughts, and important messages.
about.copy_ready_desc: Instantly copy your formatted text and paste directly into LinkedIn posts.
about.cta_title: Ready to Format Your LinkedIn Posts?
about.cta_description: Use our free LinkedIn text formatter to create professional, eye-catching posts.
about.step1_desc: Type your LinkedIn post content in the editor
about.step2_desc: Choose text and apply bold, italic, or other formatting
about.step3_desc: Copy the formatted text and paste it into your LinkedIn post
about.benefit1_desc: Formatted posts attract more views, likes, and comments
about.benefit2_desc: Stand out with clean, well-formatted professional content
about.benefit3_desc: Formatted text is easier to scan and understand quickly
about.benefit4_desc: Well-formatted content performs better in LinkedIn's algorithm
about.hero_tagline: Giving character back to your words.
about.hero_desc_new: Boldify was born from a simple observation: LinkedIn is the professional network, but its editing tools have stayed stuck in the past. We created the solution to make your ideas shine without friction.
about.story_subtitle: More than a simple formatting tool, Boldify is the daily companion of creators who want immediate impact.
about.problem_desc: On LinkedIn, everyone uses the same font, the same style. Important messages get lost in a sea of plain text. We wanted to break this mold by offering character styles that actually work on all devices.
about.speed_desc: No sign-up, no ads, no fluff. Type, format, copy. That's it.
about.free_desc: We believe the best tools should be accessible to all creators, whether they're just starting out or experienced.
about.preview_desc: Our LinkedIn post simulator lets you see exactly how your text will look before you publish it. No more surprises with line breaks or cut emojis.
about.transparency_desc: We do not collect your writing data. What is written in Boldify stays in Boldify.
about.community_desc: Boldify evolves thanks to your feedback. Every feature added comes from a user suggestion.
about.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of creators who use Boldify every day to stand out.

how_it_works.step1_desc_new: Enter your text in the web editor. Use the toolbar to apply Bold, Italic, or elegant script fonts.
how_it_works.step2_desc_new: With our real-time Preview Card, see exactly what your post will look like once published on LinkedIn. No more bad surprises.
how_it_works.step3_desc_new: One click is enough to copy your formatted content with compatible Unicode characters. Just paste it on your favorite network.
how_it_works.editor_feature1_desc: Our tools use alphanumeric mathematical characters to guarantee readability on all devices.
how_it_works.editor_feature2_desc: Spacing and line breaks are adjusted to maximize engagement in the news feed.
how_it_works.mcp_title: The Model Context Protocol (MCP): Your Invisible Assistant
how_it_works.mcp_desc: MCP allows Boldify to integrate directly into your development tools or AI assistants. It acts as a bridge of structured data.
how_it_works.mcp_feature1_desc: The MCP identifies key points from your raw documents to suggest hook formats.
how_it_works.mcp_feature2_desc: Switch from your favorite text editor to Boldify without losing context thanks to the resource sharing protocol.
how_it_works.final_cta_desc: Join thousands of content creators who use Boldify to stand out on LinkedIn.

help.title: Help & FAQ - LinkedIn Text Formatting Guide | Boldify
help.description: Complete help guide for LinkedIn text formatting. Learn how to use bold, italic text in LinkedIn posts. FAQ and troubleshooting tips.
help.keywords: linkedin help, linkedin formatting guide, linkedin bold text help, how to format linkedin posts, linkedin text formatting FAQ
help.hero_description: Everything you need to know about formatting text for LinkedIn posts. Get help with bold, italic, and other text formatting features.
help.need_help_desc: Can't find the answer you're looking for? We're here to help you get the most out of Boldify.
help.faq1_q: How does LinkedIn text formatting work?
help.faq1_a1: Our tool uses Unicode mathematical characters that display as bold, italic, or other styled text on LinkedIn. These characters are natively supported by LinkedIn and work across all devices and platforms.
help.faq1_a2: Unlike HTML formatting, these Unicode characters become part of the text itself, ensuring compatibility everywhere LinkedIn is accessed.
help.faq2_a: Yes! Boldify is completely free to use. There are no hidden costs, subscription fees, or registration requirements. You can format unlimited LinkedIn posts at no charge.
help.faq3_q: Will formatted text work on mobile devices?
help.faq3_a: Absolutely! The Unicode characters we use are supported across all platforms including iOS, Android, and desktop. Your formatted text will display correctly whether your connections view it on mobile apps or web browsers.
help.faq5_q: How do I make text bold in LinkedIn posts?
help.faq5_a1: To make text bold in LinkedIn:
help.faq5_step1: Type your text in our editor
help.faq5_step2: Select the text you want to make bold
help.faq5_step3: Click the Bold (B) button in the toolbar
help.faq5_step5: Paste it directly into your LinkedIn post
help.faq6_q: Why isn't my formatted text displaying correctly?
help.faq6_a1: If your formatted text isn't displaying properly, try these solutions:
help.faq6_sol1: Make sure you're copying the entire formatted text from the preview
help.faq6_sol2: Paste directly into LinkedIn without additional formatting
help.faq6_sol3: Avoid copying from other applications that might alter the characters
help.faq6_sol4: Try refreshing your browser if the editor isn't working properly
help.faq7_q: Can I use this for other social media platforms?
help.faq7_a1: Yes! While Boldify is optimized for LinkedIn, the Unicode formatting works on many other platforms including:
help.faq7_a2: However, each platform may display the characters slightly differently.
help.bp1_desc: Bold text is most effective when used for key points, headings, or calls-to-action. Overusing it reduces impact.
help.bp2_desc: LinkedIn is a professional platform. Use formatting to enhance clarity and readability, not for decorative purposes.
help.bp3_desc: Always preview your formatted text using our preview feature before posting to ensure it looks correct.
help.hero_desc_new: Find quick answers about text formatting, LinkedIn compatibility and MCP installation.
help.formatting_q1: Why isn't my bold text displaying correctly on mobile?
help.formatting_a1: Boldify uses Unicode mathematical characters to simulate bold. While most modern smartphones support them, some older browsers may display squares. We recommend using the "Sans-Serif Bold" style for maximum compatibility.
help.formatting_q2: Can I mix multiple styles in a single post?
help.formatting_a2: Absolutely. You can select different parts of your text in the editor and apply distinct styles (Bold, Italic, Script) to create a strong visual hierarchy in your publications.
help.linkedin_q1: Does using formatted text hurt my LinkedIn reach?
help.linkedin_a1: LinkedIn does not directly penalize Unicode. However, accessibility matters: screen readers may have difficulty with these characters. Use bold sparingly to highlight keywords, not entire paragraphs.
help.linkedin_q2: How do I copy-paste without losing formatting?
help.linkedin_a2: Simply use the built-in "Copy" button in Boldify. It captures the transformed version of your text ready to be pasted directly into the LinkedIn publication field without alteration.
help.mcp_q1: What is the MCP protocol and why use it?
help.mcp_a1: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) allows Boldify to integrate directly with your favorite AI tools (like Claude). This lets you format your texts without leaving your usual writing interface.
help.mcp_protip: Protip: Installation requires Claude Desktop. Download our JSON configuration file in the MCP tab.
help.mcp_q2: My MCP is not connecting, what should I do?
help.mcp_a2: Check that the path to the node executable is correct in your configuration file. Also make sure you restarted your desktop app after modifying the claude_desktop_config.json file.
help.preview_section_desc: Our preview tool simulates the native LinkedIn interface to ensure your formatting is perfectly aligned and readable on all screens.
help.support_desc: Our team is available to help you personally.
help.preview_sample_text:

𝗪𝗵𝘆 𝘁𝗿𝘆 𝗶𝘁 ?

• 𝗣𝘂𝘁 𝗶𝗻 𝗮𝗱𝘃𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲𝗱 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺: lists, 𝗶𝘁𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗰𝘀, 𝗯𝗼𝗹𝗱, etc.
• 𝗣𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Adapt your posts to your image.

mcp.title: Boldify MCP – Format your LinkedIn posts from your AI
mcp.description: Connect Claude or GPT to the Boldify engine via the Model Context Protocol. Transform Markdown or HTML into formatted LinkedIn text without leaving your chat interface.
mcp.keywords: MCP, Model Context Protocol, Boldify MCP, LinkedIn AI formatting, Claude Desktop
mcp.hero_title: Boldify MCP: Format your LinkedIn posts directly from your AI
mcp.hero_description: Connect the intelligence of your Claude or GPT models to the Boldify engine. Instantly transform Markdown or HTML into professional formatted text for LinkedIn without leaving your chat interface.
mcp.automation_desc: No more copy-pasting between your AI and Boldify. The AI handles formatting automatically via the MCP server's local API.
mcp.consistency_desc: Guarantee an identical visual style for all your posts, whether written by you or generated by your intelligent assistant.
mcp.time_saving_desc: Reduce your content creation workflow by 50%. From idea to formatted LinkedIn post in a single voice or text command.
mcp.cta_title: Ready to take it to the next level?
mcp.cta_desc: Join the creators who are already automating their LinkedIn presence with Boldify and the Model Context Protocol.
mcp.http_desc: Nothing to install. Point your MCP client at our hosted server and start formatting in seconds.
mcp.http_item1: Direct HTTP connection — no dependencies required.
mcp.http_item3: Works with Claude Desktop and any standard MCP client.
mcp.local_desc: Prefer full control? Install the MCP server locally with a single command and run Boldify on your own machine.
mcp.local_item3: Full support for bold, italic and special scripts.
